actionUnits.condition: Physics trigger enter on Plane (2) (MeshCollider id=1620417933, m_IsTrigger=1, convex=1). MonoBehaviour id=1620417931 uses script guid=9cde80f2fe6fe6e47b57eb962721c06f (OtherLaneController) with aparicionBola=Transform fileID 165335085 and bolaPrefab guid=1be75124d3e50ad4997a90e0d8d1fe74. When an object with Rigidbody and tag 'Ball' enters this trigger, OtherLaneController.OnTriggerEnter (IEnumerator) waits 5s, reads BallSoundController.peso and pesoEnKgs from the entering object, destroys it, then calls GeneraBola to set those values on bolaPrefab, instantiate it at aparicionBola, and apply Rigidbody.AddForce(Vector3(1,0,0)*1.5, Impulse). Ensure the entering object has tag 'Ball' and component BallSoundController, and the instantiated bolaPrefab has Rigidbody and BallSoundController.
